coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether a Director-level promotion setback has changed James's engagement, confidence, and sense of a credible path forward.
openingQuestion: What did you take away from the promotion decision, and how is that shaping where you're putting your energy right now?
listenFor: whether he names a specific piece of feedback he heard versus speaking in vague summaries
whether he volunteers a concrete example of pulling back from a team ritual or quickly pivots away from that topic
whether he describes the mentoring program with specific Director-level outcomes or as work that mainly feels easier to invest in
avoid: do not jump into defending the promotion decision before you know what feedback actually landed
do not treat lower ritual participation as attitude without testing whether it reflects disappointment, uncertainty, or a priorities shift
goodOutcome: You and James have agreed what Director-level path forward you are testing now, including whether mentoring is part of his promotion case or secondary to his core scope.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of his changed participation in a team ritual and one exact feedback point from the promotion discussion so you can test what he heard against what was said.
